import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; import { Search, SlidersHorizontal, MapPin, X, ShieldCheck, Zap } from 'lucide-react'; export default function Explore() { const [selectedItem, setSelectedItem] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('All'); const listings = [ { id: 1, title: 'Power Drill', category: 'Tools', wtk: 40, dist: '0.8 km', user: 'Rahul K.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504148455328-c376907d081c?w=500', desc: 'Heavy duty brushless motor drill. Includes 2 batteries.' }, { id: 2, title: 'Yoga Session', category: 'Wellness', wtk: 60, dist: '1.2 km', user: 'Priya S.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544367567-0f2fcb009e0b?w=500', desc: '1-hour Vinyasa flow focusing on breath and flexibility.' }, { id: 3, title: 'Python Tutoring', category: 'Education', wtk: 150, dist: '2.5 km', user: 'Sara M.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515879218367-8466d910aaa4?w=500', desc: 'Beginner friendly coding help for data science.' } ]; return (
{['All', 'Tools', 'Education', 'Wellness'].map(cat => ( ))}
{listings.filter(i => activeTab === 'All' || i.category === activeTab).map(item => (
{item.category}

{item.title}

{item.wtk}
